programme.title: Pablo

programme.title: Jen a Jim

programme.title: Anifeiliaid Bach y Byd

programme.title: Odo

programme.title: Gold Is Where You Find It
programme.desc: Director: Francis Searle. Stars Eddie Byrne, Dermot Kelly. Steve returns to Ireland after 20 years a millionaire. When he gets drunk and loses his gold nuggets, everyone thinks there's a gold rush.

programme.title: Look At Life Watch on the Coast
programme.desc: 1968. A short film following the work of the Coastguards who secure Britain's coasts.

programme.title: Burke's Law
programme.desc: 1964. Who Killed What's His Name? Directed by Don Taylor. Stars Gene Barry, Gary Conway & Regis Toomey. The elaborate robbery of a bank ends with the unprovoked shooting death of its owner.

programme.title: Emergency Call
programme.desc: 1952. Drama. A young child must have a blood transfusion, but she has a rare blood group. Can a donor be found? Starring Jack Warner and Anthony Steel. [S]

programme.title: To Have And To Hold
programme.desc: 1951. Drama. Director: Godfrey Grayson. Stars Avis Scott, Patrick Barr & Robert Ayres. Following a riding accident, a countryman spends his final days arranging the future security of his family. [S]

programme.title: The Red House
programme.desc: 1947. Drama. Director Delmer Daves and starring Edward G Robinson, Lon McCallister, Judith Anderson and Rory Calhoun. Two girls, when told not to, explore mysterious woodland and discover secrets. [S]

programme.title: Poldark
programme.desc: 1996. Drama. Director: Richard Laxton. Stars John Bowe, Mel Martin, Michael Attwell. Set in the 19th century, this epic tale follows the Poldark family, their tangled destinies and a family feud. [S]

programme.title: The Edgar Wallace Mystery Theatre
programme.desc: Playback. 1962. Directed by Quentin Lawrence. Stars Margit Saad, Barry Foster & Victoria Platt. A Police officer awaits a life-changing verdict and reflects on his own arrest. [S]

programme.title: The Adventures of Robin Hood
programme.desc: A Guest for The Gallows. 1955. Stars Richard Greene, Victor Woolf & Archie Duncan. For obvious reasons, Robin and the Sheriff are sworn enemies. Why then should the Sheriff seek Robin's help? [S]

programme.title: Last Holiday
programme.desc: 1950. Drama. Directed by Henry Cass. Stars Alec Guinness, Beatrice Campbell & Kay Walsh. A salesman who learns he has months to live cashes in his savings to live in a fancy hotel. [S]

programme.title: The Cheaters
programme.desc: The Man Who Wouldn't Be Paid. 1961. Stars John Ireland & Ian Fleming. Benjamin Clarke buys a rare book for a fraction of its real worth and puts himself at the mercy of his gold-digging family. [S]

programme.title: Cactus Flower
programme.desc: 1969. Comedy. Directed by Gene Saks. Stars Walter Matthau, Ingrid Bergman & Goldie Hawn. A dentist convinces his assistant to pose as his wife so he can avoid marrying his girlfriend. [S]

programme.title: Z-Cars
programme.desc: By the Book. 1963. Stars Joseph Brady, Brian Blessed & John Phillips. While Barlow leads the inquiry into the murder of an 8 year old boy, PC Weir and Smith are tasked with finding a green bike. [S]

programme.title: Public Eye
programme.desc: 1969. Detective & Mystery Drama. The Comedian's Graveyard. Stars Alfred Burke, Peter Badger & Mona Bruce. Frank is instructed to find a stage-struck teenager who has run away from home. [S]

programme.title: The Reckless Moment
programme.desc: 1949. Drama. Director: Max Ophuls. Stars James Mason, Joan Bennett & Geraldine Brooks. Finding her daughter's lover dead, a housewife takes desperate measures to protect her family from scandal. [S]

programme.title: Cellar Club with Caroline Munro
programme.desc: Caroline Munro opens the Cellar Club, introducing The Omega Factor! Enjoy this strange and supernatural series to begin tonight's show. [S]

programme.title: The Omega Factor
programme.desc: The Undiscovered Country. 1979. Stars James Hazeldine, Louise Jameson & John Carlisle. John Crane is fascinated with the occult. He challenges the dangerous Drexil but comes to a tragic result. [S]

programme.title: Cellar Club with Caroline Munro
programme.desc: Up next, Caroline Munro is here to introduce the 1977 film, A Saint, A Woman, A Devil. [S]

programme.title: A Saint, A Woman, A Devil
programme.desc: 1977. Drama. Director: Peter Savage. Stars Joanna Bell, Marc Stevens & Sonny Landham. Sylvia is a seemingly quiet and saintly person. But she is hiding a promiscuous multiple personality disorder. [S]

programme.title: Cellar Club with Caroline Munro
programme.desc: Caroline Munro closes the Cellar Club tonight, but not before giving us a peak into what is coming up next week. [S]

programme.title: Too Young To Love
programme.desc: 1959. Directed by Muriel Box. Stars Jess Conrad, Pauline Hahn, Joan Miller & Austin Willis. Based on the play, Pickup Girl by Elsa Shelley. A story of a young girl's lapse into sex delinquency. [S]

programme.title: As Long as They're Happy
programme.desc: 1955. Comedy. Directed by J. Lee Thompson. Stars Jack Buchanan, Janette Scott, Jean Carson. In England, an American singer causes havoc when he stays with a stockbroker's family by mistake. [S]

programme.title: Look At Life Bronze, Silver...
programme.desc: ... and Gold. 1969. A fascinating look at the challenge provided by the Duke Of Edinburgh's Award scheme to children in Britain.

programme.title: Out of Town
programme.desc: Sweetheart Story/Tyring a Cart. 1986. Jack shows a film of a house sale he attended in Berkshire and recounts the story of two lovers at opposite ends of the Edwardian social ladder. [S]

programme.title: Captain Scarlett
programme.desc: 1953. Adventure. Director: Thomas Carr. Stars Richard Greene, Leonora Amar & Manolo Fabregas. Scarlett returns to France to find the Duke of Corlaine seizing property and terrorising resistors. [S]

programme.title: What's On TPTV With Noel
programme.desc: Founder of Talking Pictures TV and one half of the Footage Detectives, Noel Cronin, shares shows and films not to be missed throughout April and May. [S]

programme.title: Legend of the Hidden City
programme.desc: 1997. Stars Brendan Pollecutt, Fezile Mpela & Robert Finlayson. Things get scary for Dean and Thabo. They start to lose hope of returning safely.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sir Lancelot
programme.desc: Knight Errant. 1957. Stars William Russell, Cyril Smith & Ronald Leigh-Hunt. Two sisters are left a small kingdom by the father, but the older girl is being set up to marry by her guardian. [S]

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: The Unkindest Tut of All. 1967. Stars Adam West, Burt Ward & Yvonne Craig. Tut fakes crime predictions to gain police trust, then lures them away to steal scrolls tied to a statue of cosmic power. [S]

programme.title: The Roy Rogers Show
programme.desc: Johnny Rover. 1955. Stars Roy Rogers, Trigger and Dale Evans. A tyrannical Boston financier travels to Mineral City to confront his son and stirs up trouble. [S]

programme.title: Captain Scarlet and the Mysterons
programme.desc: Spectrum Strikes Back. 1967. Stars Sylvia Anderson, Ed Bishop & Paul Maxwell. Spectrum leaders go to a secret conference to present new anti-Mysteron devices, but the Mysterons plan to interfere. [S]

programme.title: William Tell
programme.desc: The Surgeon. 1959. Stars: Conrad Phillips, Willoughby Goddard & Jennifer Jayne. Seriously wounded, Tell is taken to the home of a Swiss surgeon. To throw Gessler off their trail. [S]

programme.title: The Buccaneers
programme.desc: Dangerous Cargo. 1957. Stars Robert Shaw, Sarah Lawson & Ivan Craig. Tempest is tasked with transferring a very important passenger to Barbados under the watchful eye of the Spanish. [S]

programme.title: The Adventures of Robin Hood
programme.desc: The Scientist. 1956. Stars Richard Greene, Alan Wheatley & Archie Duncan. A scientist who is being hunted down, after developing a terrifying new weapon, seeks Robin's help. [S]

programme.title: Destination Space
programme.desc: 1959. Sci-fi. Directed by Joseph Penvey. Stars Harry Townes, John Agar & Charles Aidman. The U.S. attempts to launch a mission to the Moon, but the plan is disrupted when a meteor strikes. [S]

programme.title: Dial 999
programme.desc: Missing Person. 1958. Stars Robert Beatty, Barbara Steele & Vera Day. Maguire must adopt unusual tactics when the bodies of three girls are found in the Thames, with no obvious reason why. [S]

programme.title: My Brother's Keeper
programme.desc: 1948. Thriller. Directed by Alfred Roome and starring Jack Warner, George Cole, David Tomlinson and Bill Owen. Two convicts escape, handcuffed to each other and things get worse when they're seen. [S]

programme.title: Scotland Yard
programme.desc: 1961. The Never Never Murder. Directed by Peter Duffell. Starring Russell Napier, Genine Graham and Maurice Good. A dead body sets the police on the track of a fraudster. (S1, E37)

programme.title: Whiplash
programme.desc: Stage for Two. 1961. Stars Peter Graves, Leonard Teale & Peter Guest. Cobb is hijacked by a bank robber running from the law and his gang. When the gang catch up, it is unclear who is the threat. [S]

programme.title: Reach For The Sky
programme.desc: 1956. War drama. Directed by Lewis Gilbert and stars Kenneth More, Muriel Pavlow and Lyndon Brook. This is the true story of Douglas Bader, who loses his legs but returns to flight during WW2. [S]

programme.title: Maigret

programme.title: Hello Kitty: Super Style!

programme.title: Hello Kitty: Super Style!

programme.title: Hello Kitty: Super Style!

programme.title: Hello Kitty: Super Style!

programme.title: Hello Kitty: Super Style!

programme.title: Hello Kitty: Super Style!

programme.title: Hello Kitty: Super Style!

programme.title: I'm a Celebrity... South Africa
programme.desc: This show sees the return of some of the most memorable campmates from I'm a Celebrity... Get Me Out of Here! They survived the Australian jungle or the Welsh castle, but South Africa is an even harder proposition which will push them to their limits and test them like never before. In the penultimate episode of the series, the remaining contestants take on Cyclone. Will they be victorious and win their dinner for this evening or will it be rice and beans. The celebs remaining at the end of this episode will move into the live final, where one of them will be crowned a legend.

programme.title: The Neighbourhood
programme.desc: Graham Norton hosts The Neighbourhood, a brand-new high stakes, street-sized popularity contest. Set in the heart of The Peak District, six households from across the UK move into a 'picture-perfect' village to compete for a massive £250,000 prize. But don't let the ducklings and the quaint cafe fool you - behind the smiles and the sandwiches, the knives are already out. The households live side by side 24/7 and try to keep their neighbours' onside to avoid being voted out during 'a removal'. They have a chance to save themselves from the removals by winning immunity in the neighbourhood challenges. Not wasting any time, Graham suspends the neighbours seven metres high in the first immunity challenge that gets them all in a spin, with revelations about each other they'd perhaps rather not air in public. Which household can snatch safety and save themselves from the first vote? And who is going to find themselves in the firing line early on?

programme.title: New: I'm A Celebrity South Africa...
programme.desc: ...Live Final. In the results show of the live final, the moment has come for one of the remaining three celebrities to be crowned a Legend. But who it is, is down to the public. [S,HD] S2 Ep16

programme.title: Jason Atherton's Dubai Dishes
programme.desc: The first episode of a series that follows chef Jason Atherton in Dubai as he showcases some fantastic local ingredients, celebrated foodie hotspots, and brilliant local chefs as he cooks up some delicious recipes that are inspired by the region. Jason's debut in Dubai is all things spice as he explores a traditional souk in the heart of the old town and shows us how to spice up our life Dubai-style - Jason is also joined by Dubai chef Rahul Rana, who makes a chocolate that is filled with spiced beetroot curry.

programme.title: James Martin's French Adventure
programme.desc: James's travels around France take him to picturesque Charente, where he starts his journey in the heart of the Cognac region - inspired by a visit to a distillery, James uses cognac for his first alfresco cook-up before following in the footsteps of the Queen Mother and visiting the Chateau Venteuil, the home of the De La Rochefoucauld family. James meets a miller who still uses traditional methods to make award-winning brioche in the shadow of the chateau - he then creates a superb salad which incorporates some of the region's best produce and includes the brilliant brioche. Back in the UK, James makes a classic French onion soup and pays homage to the patron saint of pastry chefs with a stunning dessert.

programme.title: Jurassic Park: The Lost World
programme.desc: Jeff Goldblum and Julianne Moore, 1997. A research team's observation project on the newly-released dinosaurs of Jurassic Park is threatened.

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh hosts as Jon Sopel, Maisie Summers-Newton, Perri Shakes-Drayton and Brian Conley take on the challenge and hope to win thousands of pounds for their chosen charities.

programme.title: Celebrity Sabotage
programme.desc: Get ready for a brand-new and hilarious reality game show that's jam-packed with all your favourite celebrities! Each week Joel Dommett, Judi Love, Sam Thompson and GK Barry are set secret missions to sabotage the unsuspecting contestants of totally fake TV shows, all to build up a secret prize pot! Along the way they'll be joined by special celebrity guests from Emma Willis to Clare Balding. This final episode of the series sees the celebs take on 'The Backstabber' - a haunting reality show hosted by Rylan Clark, who is totally in on the whole thing. But that's not all as actress Fay Ripley joins Mission HQ to get involved with all the mayhem as this week's rebellious Guest Saboteur. Expect chaos, carnage and calamity!

programme.title: New: Britain's Got Talent
programme.desc: Britain's Got Talent goes live on Saturday nights for the Semi-Finals as the acts who impressed the judges during auditions must now compete for a place in the grand finale. [S,HD] S19 Ep9

programme.title: The Neighbourhood
programme.desc: Graham Norton hosts The Neighbourhood, a brand-new high stakes, street-sized popularity contest. Set in the heart of The Peak District, six households from across the UK move into a 'picture-perfect' village to compete for a massive £250,000 prize. The removal of the first household sends ripples through the Neighbourhood. One family is left reeling by the vote they received and their sights are set on revenge. New arrivals take centre stage as they attempt to integrate into the close. Distinct bonds and divisions begin to emerge as everyone finds their footing in the game. Overnight, the close is invaded by Gnomes for the second neighbourhood immunity challenge - which exposes some cutthroat gameplay. One family comes to blows over plans to use dirty tactics, threatening to fracture their relationship. With the next removal just around the corner, whose time on the close is nearly up?

programme.title: ITV News
programme.desc: National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world. [S,HD]

programme.title: Minority Report
programme.desc: Intriguing crime action based loosely on noted author Philip K Dick's 1956 novella The Minority Report. In the year 2054, crime is virtually eliminated from Washington, D.C. thanks to an elite law-enforcing squad that uses gifted humans with special powers to see into the future and predict crimes beforehand - John Anderton heads the team and believes steadfastly in the system's flawlessness... that is, until the day the squad predicts that Anderton will commit a murder in the next 36 hours.

programme.title: English Football League Highlights
programme.desc: Action from across the Football League, featuring West Brom v Ipswich, Norwich v Swansea, Sheffield United v Preston and Stoke v Portsmouth. [S,HD]

programme.desc: Graham Norton hosts The Neighbourhood, a brand-new high stakes, street-sized popularity contest. Set in the heart of The Peak District, six households from across the UK move into a 'picture-perfect' village to compete for a massive £250,000 prize. The households live side by side 24/7 and try to keep their neighbours' onside to avoid being voted out during 'a removal'. They have a chance to save themselves from the removals by winning immunity in the neighbourhood challenges. Not wasting any time, Graham suspends the neighbours seven metres high in the first immunity challenge that gets them all in a spin, with revelations about each other they'd perhaps rather not air in public. Which household can snatch safety and save themselves from the first vote? And who is going to find themselves in the firing line early on?

James meets a miller who still uses traditional methods to make award-winning brioche in the shadow of the chateau - he then creates a superb salad which incorporates some of the region's best produce and includes the brilliant brioche. Back in the UK, James makes a classic French onion soup and pays homage to the patron saint of pastry chefs with a stunning dessert.
